name: uf-schedule-mcp
description: Search the University of Florida Schedule of Courses.
long_description: Search the public University of Florida Schedule of Courses (one.uf.edu) by term, department, course code, instructor, credits, days/periods, gen-ed, writing, Quest, online type and more. Accepts human-friendly inputs (e.g. 'Fall 2026', 'Mathematics') and resolves them to UF's internal codes.

tools.name: search_courses
tools.description: Search the UF Schedule of Courses with full filters.

tools.name: get_filter_options
tools.description: List valid term / department / level / category codes.

tools.name: get_course
tools.description: Look up one course and its sections by code.

tools.name: get_syllabus
tools.description: Fetch a section's published syllabus content from UF Simple Syllabus.
